sections.description: Full-stack SEO management plugin. Handles title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, cache purge, and self-updates. RankMath not required.
sections.changelog:
2.0.5

Fix WSOD on Cloudways/LiteSpeed: removed register_activation_hook flush. Rewrite rule registration and one-time flush now handled safely in init hook via version-keyed option.

2.0.4

Fix llms.txt 500: use WP rewrite rule + template_redirect + query_vars. Flush rewrite rules on activation.

2.0.3

Rename to RankRocket SEO. Fix llms.txt + sitemap hooks. Self-update removes stale plugin copies.
